title: Web API / BFF structured assurance preset
targetUser: API or BFF maintainers who need stable PR quality, request/response contract traceability, and a low-friction path from Issue to assurance review.

recommendedWhen: The change modifies externally visible HTTP or BFF contracts.
Reviewers need to connect requirements, OpenAPI or route contracts, tests, and PR evidence.
The team can retain CI artifacts and run the reference flow locally.
notRecommendedWhen: The change is a short-lived one-off script with no retained API contract.
There is no CI or artifact retention path for verification evidence.
The route only needs high-level prose review and no executable check.

requiredInputs.name: Requirement or Issue summary
requiredInputs.description: Captures the user-visible change, non-goals, and reviewer questions before implementation.

requiredInputs.name: HTTP contract or route specification
requiredInputs.description: Defines the request/response contract that the PR must preserve or intentionally change.

requiredInputs.name: Context Pack and Boundary Map
requiredInputs.description: Fixes the design SSOT, implementation slice, and dependency boundary before code changes.

requiredInputs.name: ExecPlan v2
requiredInputs.description: Connects tasks, validation commands, output artifacts, rollback, and evidence requirements.

startingCommand.purpose: Run the default PR-quality baseline and produce a verify-lite summary for review.

defaultVerificationCommands.purpose: Validate the design SSOT before executing API/BFF implementation work.
Confirm route/controller/data-access ownership boundaries and dependency edges.
Check that tasks, commands, evidence requirements, and rollback are reviewable.
Render a PR-facing assurance review surface after evidence artifacts exist.

expectedArtifacts.reviewPurpose: Shows whether the default local verification lane passed.
Shows whether API/BFF ownership and dependency boundaries match the Context Pack.
Links implementation tasks, validation commands, output artifacts, and rollback.
Human-readable PR surface for claim/evidence inspection.

evidenceSurfaces.description: Record Context Pack conflict status, validation evidence, and rollback summary.
Summarizes claim/evidence status without granting approval authority.

escalationRule.trigger: Escalate when the route handles authentication, authorization, payment, PII, cross-service contract breakage, or a policy `risk:high` label.
escalationRule.action: Add security or high-assurance lanes, require human maintainer approval, and keep policy-gate enforcement changes in a separate policy issue.

optionalCommands.purpose: Exercise the fixture-backed security assurance lane when security claims are in scope.

specVerificationKit.guidance: Use `pnpm run spec-kit-min:verify` when route behavior can be expressed as traceable BDD or property checks.

specKitBridge.guidance: Use `pnpm run spec-kit:import-feature` only when the team already has Spec Kit feature artifacts.
